CustomField.description: Summary of Platform Event work item execution status with published/failure counts.
CustomField.formula: IF(TotalEventsPlanned__c = 0, "", IF(TotalEventsPlanned__c = TotalEventsProcessed__c && TotalEventsPublished__c = TotalEventsProcessed__c, "✅ " & TEXT(TotalEventsPublished__c) & " published", IF(TotalEventsProcessed__c > 0 && TotalEventsPublished__c = 0, "❌ " & TEXT(TotalEventsProcessed__c) & " failed", IF(TotalEventsProcessed__c = 0, "⏸️ " & TEXT(TotalEventsPlanned__c) & " planned, not executed", "⚠️ " & TEXT(TotalEventsPublished__c) & "/" & TEXT(TotalEventsPlanned__c) & " published" & IF(TotalEventsProcessed__c - TotalEventsPublished__c > 0, " (" & TEXT(TotalEventsProcessed__c - TotalEventsPublished__c) & " failed" & IF(TotalEventsPlanned__c - TotalEventsProcessed__c > 0, ", " & TEXT(TotalEventsPlanned__c - TotalEventsProcessed__c) & " not executed)", ")" ), IF(TotalEventsPlanned__c - TotalEventsProcessed__c > 0, " (" & TEXT(TotalEventsPlanned__c - TotalEventsProcessed__c) & " not executed)", "" ) ) ) ) ) )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Summary of Platform Event work item execution status.
CustomField.label: Event Summary
